title: fabric-hint next modularization 040 — decide/config/state/emit
description: ISS-040: fabric-hint.cjs 仍 ~1933 LOC。下一刀提取 signal-decide、hint-config、session-signal-state、assistant-turn-emit 到 lib/*；保持 module.exports 表面稳定；测试继续可 require facade。
action: Extract from packages/cli/templates/hooks/fabric-hint.cjs into packages/cli/templates/hooks/lib/: (1) signal-decide.cjs — decide(...) + signal policy helpers used only by decide; (2) hint-config.cjs — threshold readers (readArchiveHintHours, readReviewHintPendingCount, readReviewHintPendingAgeDays, readMaintenanceHintDays, readMaintenanceHintCooldownDays, readCooldownHours, readUnderseedThreshold, readArchiveEditThreshold, readArchiveBacklogSessionCount, readArchiveBacklogIdleHours) + DEFAULT_* constants needed by readers; (3) session-signal-state.cjs — readShownCache/writeShownCache, readDismissedSignals/writeSessionDismiss/sessionDismissFileName, readMaintenanceLastEmit/writeMaintenanceLastEmit, DISMISSABLE_SIGNALS; (4) assistant-turn-emit.cjs — parseKbLine, extractAndWriteAssistantTurnsBestEffort (+ detectClient re-export or require client-adapter). fabric-hint.cjs keeps main orchestration + module.exports re-exporting the same keys as today (main, decide, readLedger, summarizeTranscript, parseKbLine, extractAndWriteAssistantTurnsBestEffort, threshold readers, dismiss helpers, CONSTANTS, ...).

criteria: packages/cli/templates/hooks/lib/hint-config.cjs exists and exports threshold readers used by tests/CONSTANTS defaults
packages/cli/templates/hooks/lib/session-signal-state.cjs exists and exports shown-cache + dismiss + maintenance last-emit helpers
packages/cli/templates/hooks/lib/assistant-turn-emit.cjs exists and exports parseKbLine and extractAndWriteAssistantTurnsBestEffort

packages/cli/templates/hooks/fabric-hint.cjs module.exports still includes keys: main, decide, readLedger, summarizeTranscript, parseKbLine, extractAndWriteAssistantTurnsBestEffort, readDismissedSignals, writeSessionDismiss, readShownCache, writeShownCache, CONSTANTS
packages/cli/templates/hooks/fabric-hint.cjs LOC reduced from ~1933 (target ≤1400 or clear residual documented if main still thick)
convergence.verification: ls lib/{signal-decide,hint-config,session-signal-state,assistant-turn-emit}.cjs; node -e "const h=require('./packages/cli/templates/hooks/fabric-hint.cjs'); console.log(Object.keys(h).sort().join(','))"; vitest suite above; wc -l fabric-hint.cjs
convergence.definition_of_done: fabric-hint 下一轮 concern split 落地；exports 稳定；相关测试绿；ISS-040 close 或显式 residual（main 仍厚时写明剩余 concern），禁止 false-close。

files.change: Move decide(events, now, pendingStats, underseedStats, editCounterStats, thresholds, banner, importInFlight, backlogStats) and pure helpers only it needs
Move read* threshold helpers and DEFAULT_* constants they own

files.target: shown cache / dismiss / maintenance last emit

files.change: Move cite/assistant-turn emission helpers; require cite-line-parser/client-adapter as needed
require new libs; re-export same public surface; keep main orchestration

implementation: Inventory module.exports keys at fabric-hint.cjs:1830+ as freeze list before extract
Extract hint-config first (lowest coupling threshold readers)
Extract session-signal-state (shown cache + dismiss + maintenance emit)
Extract signal-decide (decide + dependent pure helpers); inject config/state via params or requires
Wire fabric-hint.cjs requires and re-exports; keep CONSTANTS object fields identical for tests
Run full fabric-hint* + summarize-transcript vitest suite; fix only export wiring bugs
If full 4-way extract exceeds budget, land ≥2 modules with residual list — do not false-close 040

success_metrics: orchestrator LOC reduced or residual explicit

reference.pattern: ISS-020 extract style: ledger-scan/pending-stats/import-state/transcript-summary required by fabric-hint and re-exported

rationale.chosen_approach: Four concern modules mirror residual extract_targets in context-package; facade stability avoids rewriting 187 tests
rationale.tradeoffs: main may remain sizable; next residual ok if decide/config/state/emit extracted

risks: Circular requires among lib modules — prefer param injection for decide
CONSTANTS freeze surface large — must keep field names for tests
detectClient duplication vs client-adapter — prefer require client-adapter if already equivalent
